title: Roughly Enough Characters [REC][RECH][JECH for fabric]
description: Adds pinyin search for Minecraft(Fabric). | 为 Minecraft 增加拼音搜索，Just Enough Charcaters 的 Fabric 版本
body:
This mod is designed for Chinese (pinyin) speakers. It will enable you to search Chinese using pinyin. It's a fabric port for [Just Enough Characters](https://minecraft.curseforge.com/projects/just-enough-characters).

---

Fabric 版本的 [Just Enough Characters](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/just-enough-characters) 。让你在以下位置使用拼音搜索：

- 创造模式物品栏
- REI
- AE2 终端和接口终端
- Controlling
- ModMenu
- JEI (by @vfyjxf)
- Tom's Simple Storage Mod (by @vfyjxf)
